# ACME Weekly Technical Analysis

**Trend:** Higher highs / higher lows since the 2025 low; price above the rising 30-week SMA.

## Scenarios
- Bull continuation (55%): break and hold above 105 resistance targets 118, then 130.
- Consolidation (30%): range 92-105 while the 200-week SMA catches up.
- Reversal (15%): weekly close below 92 invalidates the uptrend, opens 84.
